description: Product description This pirate fancy dress accessory set for children is perfect for all kinds of pirate costumes for Halloween, fancy dress parties, kids imaginative play, school plays and costume days, cosplay, and disguises. From swashbuckling sailors to brilliant buccaneers, the toy cutlass and accompanying accessories are an essential for any pirate outfit. The toy set contains a curved pirate sword that is 37.5cm long, an attractive shiny clip-on gold hoop earring, and a black eyepatch with elastic and skull and crossbones detail. The set is made of Plastic, making it lightweight and perfect for kids to hold for display, and carry with them all day. Bring out your child's inner pirate, and take them on a fun trip to theme parks and plays with this easy-to-wear 3-piece Pirate fancy dress accessory set. A quality product from trusted Henbrandt. Sold in packs of 1, 2, 3, 6 and 12 3-piece Pirate Cutlass Sword and Accessory Sets per order. Recommended for children aged 3+ and adult supervision is advised. Safety Warning WARNING! Choking hazard, small parts. This toy does not provide protection.
